allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/factions/necrons.json'\); console.log\('faction:', d.faction\); console.log\('bsRevision:', d.bsRevision\); console.log\('units:', d.units.length\); console.log\('---first 3 names:', d.units.slice\(0,3\).map\(u=>u.name\)\); console.log\('---sample unit:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.units.find\(u=>u.name==='Imotekh the Stormlord'\), null, 2\)\);")
